_spec.purpose: Caption variety-engine ledger. The caption room MUST read this before writing and the showrunner MUST append after delivery. Divergence rules (hard constraints): opening_move must differ from the last 6 entries; structure from the last 3; closing_move phrasing from the last 1; the caption's first 4 words must not match any of the last 12 entries (caption_check --ledger enforces mechanically). Novel moves are encouraged, name them NEW:<name> and add them to CAPTION_CRAFT.md.

entry_schema.first_words: first 8 words of the shipped caption
